title: rubus hirtus var. callicarpus
intro: Rubus hirtus var. callicarpus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan raspberry-vine, is a type of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the Himalayas. The medicinal properties of Rubus hirtus var. callicarpus include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and aiding in the treatment of fever and respiratory issues. Rubus hirtus var. callicarpus can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is also used in traditional medicine to make various remedies, including salves and ointments.
